hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: direct commits to main are forbidden. Create a branch first: git checkout -b <type>-<description>"}}\n'; fi; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q '^gh' && printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q -- '--auto'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: gh --auto is forbidden. Auto-merge must never be set by Claude."}}\n'; fi
